workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples combined Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence. Both sides execute one retained-kernel command stream containing a 64-token prefill phase followed by 64 single-token decode phases under the runtime compare harness.
workload.description: Single-run Gemma-3-270M-shaped inference sequence with a 64-token prefill phase and 64 sequential single-token decode phases using Doe-owned retained inference kernels plus explicit buffer writes.
workload.name: gemma-3 270m shaped prefill 64tok + decode 64tok
